---
title: "Create Channels"
description: "Build structured chat experiences by creating channels"
---

import Something from './something'

The `ChannelRepository` provides channel creation capabilities.

<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="Custom Channel ID" icon="id-card">
    **Full control over naming**
    - Must ensure uniqueness
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

<Warning>
If you attempt to create a channel with a duplicate ID, the API returns a conflict error.
</Warning>

## Channel Types

Use community channels for open discussions.

```typescript
const channel = await repo.create({ displayName: "general" });
```
